title: Rename device - Rename
scenario: Renaming a connected Poly Bluetooth audio device from Device Settings > General does not update the device name on the Home screen
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your mobile device.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected and appears on the Home screen.
3. Tap the device name or icon to navigate to the Device Settings screen.
4. On the Device Settings screen, tap General.
5. Tap the device's official name field.
6. Enter a new name for the device.
7. Tap Done to confirm the new name.
8. Observe the device name on the Device Settings screen.
9. Navigate back to the Home screen and observe the device name there.
expected: The device name should update and display the new name on both the Device Settings screen and the Home screen.
